title: tragacantha geniculata
intro: Tragacantha geniculata, also known as Wild salsify or Goat's beard, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is known for its edible roots, which are rich in inulin, a type of fructan, and have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The roots of Tragacantha geniculata have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, and are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to improve overall health and well-being. Tragacantha geniculata can be consumed as a root vegetable, and its herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
